text:
was the hometown of Eren, Mikasa and Armin. It was destroyed by the Colossal Titan during the Titan invasion of year 858, but recovered and sealed by Eren's Titan in year 862.

Story

Trivia

Monzen can be considered as the live-action equivalent of Shiganshina District.
